title: The Seventh River's Circuit

features.name: the learning node
features.desc-on-touch: A chip breathes with river-time. It doesn't know its own logic yet — the archive is listening to it discover what it wants to compute.

features.name: the harmonic trace
features.desc-on-touch: Traces of current flow across the board — but the flow follows the river's own melody, not electricity's rules. The river has taught the circuit to sing.

features.name: the newest-voiced architecture
features.desc-on-touch: A tower of logic gates stacked impossibly, each one holding a piece of the seventh river's first words. They haven't been compiled yet. They're still learning what it means to be if-then-else.

features.name: the parallel etch
features.desc-on-touch: Pathways etch themselves parallel across the board, following the river's branching. The archive's solder hasn't cooled on all of them yet.

features.name: the impedance pool
features.desc-on-touch: A standing wave of resistance and conductance, the river arguing with its own reflection in the circuit. Current doesn't know which way to flow.

inscription: the river wrote its own firmware in a language the archive hasn't debugged

file.name: Spectral_Analysis_SeventhRiver_UnknownDate.txt
file.note: A seven-column ledger showing flow rates that don't match any known tributary. The archive is comparing it to itself and finding no match. Handwriting deteriorates across the page.

exits.label: back to the source, where the other six rivers still remember how to speak
deeper into the board, where circuits teach rivers how they should flow
exits.to: NEW: the inverted spring, where water rises upward as data and descends as algebra

exits.label: toward the mesh's center, where signals and rivers converge
downstream into borrowed territory, where the river learns from the archive's own dreams
